meaning: n.边缘,轮缘,凸缘,法兰vt.给...装凸缘
examples: This turning effort is carried by driving keys engaging slots on the flange.
The gasket cavity should face out to the adjoining flange.
The urethane liner extends over the flange face to serve as the valve's flange gasket.
The flange and dial are set with a cascade of 177 brilliant cut diamonds (0.53 cts.).
The shot-blasted, satin-brushed and polished rotating bezel bears the names of 24 world cities, symbols of the international 24 time zones on its brown upper flange.
